description_long: This object is a large, antique-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four wheels. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark, weathered metal, featuring decorative bands and a slightly flared muzzle. The carriage is constructed from thick, dark wood reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and it has two large wheels on each side for mobility. The cannon includes a lifting ring on top for maneuvering and a touch hole at the rear for ignition. The overall appearance suggests a historical artillery piece, likely from the 18th or 19th century, used for defense or ceremonial purposes. The surface shows signs of age, with patches of greenish patina and rust on the metal components.
description: A large, antique cannon with a long metal barrel mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage, featuring decorative bands and a weathered, patinated surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon barrel and the symmetrical arrangement of the wheels and carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and the four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the breech of the cannon, the touch hole, and the back of the carriage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the length of the barrel and carriage details.
